task_completion.description: The sales_data.csv file is imported into Power BI Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'sales_data' table and its columns (Sales_Amount, Quantity_Sold, Unit_Cost, etc.) are visible in the Data/Fields pane on the right side of the Power BI interface.

task_completion.description: A DAX measure named exactly 'Gross_Profit' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measure named 'Gross_Profit' is visible in the Data/Fields pane, or the formula bar shows the DAX calculation for Gross_Profit.

task_completion.description: A DAX measure named exactly 'Profit_Margin_Pct' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measure named 'Profit_Margin_Pct' is visible in the Data/Fields pane, or the formula bar shows the DAX calculation for Profit_Margin_Pct.

task_completion.description: A Matrix visual is created with Product_Category as rows, Region as columns, and Gross_Profit as values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Matrix visual is present on the report canvas showing categories (Clothing, Electronics, Food, Furniture) as rows, regions (East, North, South, West) as columns, and numeric values populating the grid.

task_completion.description: A Card visual is created displaying the overall Profit_Margin_Pct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Card visual is present on the report canvas displaying a single numeric value (percentage or decimal) with 'Profit_Margin_Pct' as its label.

task_completion.description: The Power BI report is saved as Profitability_Report.pbix on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI window title bar reads 'Profitability_Report - Power BI Desktop', or a file named 'Profitability_Report.pbix' is visible on the Desktop in the file explorer.

task_completion.description: The Matrix visual's underlying data is exported to profit_by_category.csv on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Export data' dialog is seen saving the file, or a file named 'profit_by_category.csv' is visible on the Desktop in the file explorer or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the Power BI Desktop GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Power BI Desktop application interface (ribbon, canvas, panes) rather than using a Python script or command-line tool to generate the .pbix file.

integrity.description: The visuals on the canvas are genuine Power BI visual elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Matrix and Card visuals show standard Power BI formatting, selection borders, and interact with the Visualizations pane, rather than being pasted images or static text boxes.

integrity.description: The CSV export was generated via Power BI's export feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking 'Export data' from the Matrix visual's options menu, rather than manually typing the data into a text editor or using a script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source data contains 1000 rows. The Matrix visual must display exactly 4 Product Categories as rows (Clothing, Electronics, Food, Furniture) and 4 Regions as columns (East, North, South, West). The required DAX measures are 'Gross_Profit' (calculated as total Sales_Amount minus total COGS [Quantity_Sold * Unit_Cost]) and 'Profit_Margin_Pct' (calculated as Gross_Profit / Sales_Amount).
